items.deck: California and seven other states filed an emergency motion on Friday to stop the merger of broadcasting companies Nexstar and Tegna, a corporate tie-up that would create the country’s largest operator of local television stations

items.title: Trump's inner circle fumes at 'bull****' rumors that Tulsi Gabbard plans to RESIGN over Iran war.. as insiders say exit would make the President look like a 'warmonger'
items.deck: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard fully intends to remain in her position despite rumors that she is planning to resign.

items.title: Historic heatwave to spread 'hazardous weather' across 23 states as temperatures skyrocket
items.deck: A recording-setting heat dome is expanding east, sending temperatures up to 30 degrees above normal for late-March.
